# bio
## ishaan zaveri · 2026-05-17

> Software developer in Chicago. I build, break, then photograph what's left.

I build large-scale traffic management systems at [Parsons](https://www.parsons.com/), where the edge cases tend to involve actual intersections. Before that I spent a lot of time in the guts of caches, schedulers, and the occasional kernel module.

My work tends to live where **systems** and **security** overlap: making fast things observable, and making observable things hard to abuse.

## what I care about

- Single binaries with small surface area.
- Tools that fail loudly and recover quietly.
- Photographs that don't need a caption (the captions are for me).

## elsewhere

Off the clock I shoot mostly `street` and `landscape` — a `Leica Q3` for walking, a `Sony A7iv` when I mean it. The [photo](./photo) page is the real portfolio.

```
$ whoami
ishaan — developer, photographer, occasional breaker of things
```

Say hello on the [contact](./contact) page.
